company.name: Plant Engineering People Pvt. Ltd.
company.description: A professionally managed engineering company dedicated to serve the Nuclear, Chemical, Energy, Oil, and Gas industries.

about.intro: Welcome to PEPPL, a professionally managed engineering company dedicated to serve the Nuclear, Chemical, Energy, Oil, and Gas industries. Our team is led by a qualified Mechanical Engineer with over thirty years of industry experience. At PEPPL, we pride ourselves on having skilled and knowledgeable members drawn from reputable institutions, who bring decades of expertise in their respective fields.
about.evolution: What began as a service-oriented company focused on Small and Medium Chemical industries has evolved into a multi-discipline engineering powerhouse. Over the years, we have expanded our capabilities, allowing us to transform innovative ideas into tangible realities. Our commitment to excellence drives us to continuously adapt and grow, ensuring we meet the diverse needs of our clients across various sectors.
about.dae: PEPPL is a highly esteemed vendor for the Department of Atomic Energy in India, specializing in all works associated with Nuclear fuel management. Our expertise encompasses equipments and services required for fuel fabrication, power generation, fuel reprocessing, and waste management activities. With a commitment to excellence and safety, we play a crucial role in supporting India's nuclear energy initiatives.
about.closing: Trust PEPPL for reliable and innovative solutions in nuclear fuel management as we believe in turning visions into successful projects through expert engineering solutions.

services.title: Engineering & Design
services.description: Design, Detailed Engineering, Plant Layout design, P&I layout design, Structural and Supports design and drafting, Seismic qualifications, Material Selection, Third party Testing and Inspection Services and other Project Management Services.

services.title: Fabrication & Erection
services.description: Fabrication of Industrial Structures, Erection and Commissioning of Nuclear and Chemical Process Plants. Process piping, Water and Utilities piping in Stainless Steel, Carbon Steel and DI materials, Cross country pipeline laying works for water and compressed gases.

services.title: Operations & Support
services.description: Outsourcing, Facilities Management, Business Support Services, Operation and Maintenance jobs on plant or project basis, Shutdown maintenance jobs, Construction Supervision, Safety Supervisions, Inspection Services and general Manpower Services.

projects.title: Nuclear Process Piping
projects.description: Stainless steel process piping fabrication and erection for a nuclear fuel management facility.

projects.title: Chemical Process Plant Erection
projects.description: Erection and commissioning support for a chemical process plant in the Tarapur industrial belt.

projects.title: Cross-Country Utility Pipeline
projects.description: Cross country pipeline laying works for water and compressed gases.

projects.title: Industrial Structural Fabrication
projects.description: Fabrication of industrial structures and supports for a large-scale manufacturing facility.

address.line1: Plot No: G-52, Tarapur Industrial Area
